title: Dust Mask, Dust Mask with 4pcs Additional Activated Carbon Filter, Washable and Reusable Breathable Mask for Pollen Allergy, Woodworking Mowing, Running, Cycling, Outdoor Activities
features: ACTIVATED CARBON FILTER - This dust mask with carbon filter are designed to filt out at least 95% of particulates larger than 0.3 microns in diameter. The filter is made of five layers of non-woven and activated charcoal microfiber. It is easy to provide great protection against non-oil based aerosols and blocks particles from grinding, sanding, sweeping and filters out flour, pollen, metal and wood dust.

MULTI APPLICATIONS - There are a variety of uses for this dust respirators, from mowing to running, cycling, hiking, skiing and other outdoor activities in extremely cold climates (if you have sensitivities to the cold when exercising). It works in filtering allergenic pollen. Besides, If you live in an area prone to forest fires, this dust mask can protect you from the smoke and ash. Lightweight design allows for more comfortable use.

REDUCE OVERHEATING AND FOGGING - Dual one-way exhalation valve prevents fogging and overheating exceptionally well. Thanks to its neoprene construction, it is more Well-ventilated, breathable and quick drying. It is especially useful for those who need to wear the mask for hours at a time. It is better to replace the filter every 25-30 hours if the mask is used extensively in heavy dusty operations, such as grain bins, off-loading, construction/demolition and so on.

DOUBLE STRAPPING SYSTEM - This dust mask is also designed well because it uses both a loop system which sits comfortably behind the ears to keep it firmly in place, but also has velcro strapping behind the head, so there is no need to consistently readjust the mask or have it slip. The durable design ensure a comfortable and firm fit and prevents dust and other contaminants from penetrating the mask.
Reusable Dust Mask - The dust breathing mask and valve are washable and reusable when get dirty.Super easy to change the filters cotton by yourself.
description: Why do we need dust covers? Are you experiencing dust chemicals, fumes and particles? Do you want to enjoy free outdoor life? Do you live in difficult days, dust, vehicle exhaust, pollution? Our environment is full of dust, danger, vehicle exhaust, air pollution, and the dust cover protects you from 99% of the air's dust, dirt, allergens, smoke or particles. This is a good reason to buy this activated carbon dust cover. Refuse to be a human vacuum cleaner and wear a dust-proof and anti-fog mask. Healthy and breathable, excellent safety. Installation instructions: 1. With nosepiece, away from you. Each hand holding earrings nose. 2. Put the respirator down. 3. Pull each strap over your ear. Adjust as comfortably as possible. 4. Place your fingertips on the nose bridge. Mold the nose frame into the shape of the nose bridge frame. While moving the fingertips along the sides of the nose bridge frame, squeezing the respirator with only one hand may produce a fit of the respirator. ? If the nose bridge is firmly pressed against the bridge of the nose, the position is well sealed. To replace extra filter sheets and valves: 1. Open the mask to expose the inner valve filter. 2. Follow the opening instructions on the valve and rotate the valve counterclockwise to separate the air valve. 3. Remove the filter along both valves. 4. Replace the filter with a new one. Open the closing instructions on the valve, rotate the valve clockwise and complete the replacement. Package contents: * 1 × mesh mask (with a pair of valves and filters) * 4 × additional activated carbon filter
